CVE-2022-23959.title: In Varnish Cache before 6.6.2 and 7.x before 7.0.2, Varnish Cache ...
CVE-2022-23959.description: In Varnish Cache before 6.6.2 and 7.x before 7.0.2, Varnish Cache 6.0 LTS before 6.0.10, and and Varnish Enterprise (Cache Plus) 4.1.x before 4.1.11r6 and 6.0.x before 6.0.9r4, request smuggling can occur for HTTP/1 connections.

CVE-2022-45060.title: An HTTP Request Forgery issue was discovered in Varnish Cache 5.x ...
CVE-2022-45060.description: An HTTP Request Forgery issue was discovered in Varnish Cache 5.x and 6.x before 6.0.11, 7.x before 7.1.2, and 7.2.x before 7.2.1. An attacker may introduce characters through HTTP/2 pseudo-headers that are invalid in the context of an HTTP/1 request line, causing the Varnish server to produce invalid HTTP/1 requests to the backend. This could, in turn, be used to exploit vulnerabilities in a server behind the Varnish server. Note: the 6.0.x LTS series (before 6.0.11) is affected.

CVE-2024-30156.title: Varnish Cache before 7.3.2 and 7.4.x before 7.4.3 (and before 6.0 ...
CVE-2024-30156.description: Varnish Cache before 7.3.2 and 7.4.x before 7.4.3 (and before 6.0.13 LTS), and Varnish Enterprise 6 before 6.0.12r6, allows credits exhaustion for an HTTP/2 connection control flow window, aka a Broke Window Attack.
